things.name: Ciudad Vieja (Old City)
things.description: Portuguese colonial old quarter on a promontory with the Plaza Independencia and Solis Theatre

things.name: Mercado del Puerto
things.description: 19th-century iron market with parrillas grilling the world's finest beef over wood embers

things.name: Rambla (Promenade)
things.description: World's longest seafront promenade at 22km - Montevidean life unfolds along the Rio de la Plata

things.name: Carnival Museum (Museo del Carnaval)
things.description: South America's longest carnival - 40 days with Candombe drummers and comparsas

things.name: Palacio Legislativo
things.description: Parliament building of marble from 54 countries - open for free tours

things.name: Colonia del Sacramento Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Portuguese colonial town a 1-hour ferry across the Rio de la Plata

things.name: Museo Nacional de Artes Visuales
things.description: Uruguay's national art museum in Parque Rodo with its famous collection of Torres Garcia

things.name: Feria Tristan Narvaja Sunday Market
things.description: Uruguay's largest Sunday flea market stretching several blocks with antiques and books

things.name: Punta del Este Day Trip
things.description: South America's most glamorous beach resort 130km east

things.name: Mate at a Montevidean Cafe
things.description: Uruguay is the world's largest per-capita mate drinker - everyone walks with a thermos
